title: Manage livestock production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage livestock production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for production

pcs.text: Assess the capability of land resources for grazing and determine stock, pasture and land management strategies for each land capability class
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the capability of land resources for grazing and determine stock, pasture and land management strategies for each land capability class?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the capability of land resources for grazing and determine stock, pasture and land management strategies for each land capability class.

pcs.text: Assess the suitability and sustainability of water resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the suitability and sustainability of water resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the suitability and sustainability of water resources.

pcs.text: Establish livestock production targets for each workplace for the short and long term according to the farm marketing and business plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish livestock production targets for each workplace for the short and long term according to the farm marketing and business plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish livestock production targets for each workplace for the short and long term according to the farm marketing and business plans.

pcs.text: Establish production targets, taking into consideration workplace short-term and long-term livestock production goals, herd or flock breeding improvements and relevant risk control strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish production targets, taking into consideration workplace short-term and long-term livestock production goals, herd or flock breeding improvements and relevant risk control strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish production targets, taking into consideration workplace short-term and long-term livestock production goals, herd or flock breeding improvements and relevant risk control strategies.

pcs.text: Select genetics and breeding programs based on the production targets and the marketing requirements for the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select genetics and breeding programs based on the production targets and the marketing requirements for the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select genetics and breeding programs based on the production targets and the marketing requirements for the workplace.

pcs.text: Select and design production facilities that deal sensitively with identified waste products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and design production facilities that deal sensitively with identified waste products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and design production facilities that deal sensitively with identified waste products.

pcs.text: Establish and include biosecurity and environment control measures in the production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and include biosecurity and environment control measures in the production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and include biosecurity and environment control measures in the production plan.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks associated with work activities, and incorporate control measures in the production plan according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks associated with work activities, and incorporate control measures in the production plan according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks associated with work activities, and incorporate control measures in the production plan according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare a plan that documents the decisions taken, the assessments made, the targets established, and any specific issues that relate to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a plan that documents the decisions taken, the assessments made, the targets established, and any specific issues that relate to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a plan that documents the decisions taken, the assessments made, the targets established, and any specific issues that relate to workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental risks.

pcs.text: Ensure plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of managers and operators reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of managers and operators reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of managers and operators reporting requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan for production

elements.title: Plan for livestock needs

pcs.text: Determine feed requirements for each age and sex category of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine feed requirements for each age and sex category of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine feed requirements for each age and sex category of livestock.

pcs.text: Determine most appropriate feeding plan for each livestock category based on a cost-benefit analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine most appropriate feeding plan for each livestock category based on a cost-benefit analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine most appropriate feeding plan for each livestock category based on a cost-benefit analysis.

pcs.text: Research and implement most appropriate health strategies to prevent and control disease in livestock based on a cost-benefit analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and implement most appropriate health strategies to prevent and control disease in livestock based on a cost-benefit analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and implement most appropriate health strategies to prevent and control disease in livestock based on a cost-benefit analysis.

pcs.text: Prepare schedules for purchasing and using livestock production products and services
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare schedules for purchasing and using livestock production products and services?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare schedules for purchasing and using livestock production products and services.

pcs.text: Research and implement most appropriate livestock production, harvesting, handling and transportation methods and animal welfare requirements based on a cost-benefit analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and implement most appropriate livestock production, harvesting, handling and transportation methods and animal welfare requirements based on a cost-benefit analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and implement most appropriate livestock production, harvesting, handling and transportation methods and animal welfare requirements based on a cost-benefit analysis.

pcs.text: Prepare a livestock production plan that incorporates the calendar of operations for each workplace production cycle, and the management of any specific animal welfare issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare a livestock production plan that incorporates the calendar of operations for each workplace production cycle, and the management of any specific animal welfare issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a livestock production plan that incorporates the calendar of operations for each workplace production cycle, and the management of any specific animal welfare issues.

pcs.text: Ensure plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of managers and operators reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of managers and operators reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure plan includes the type, format, frequency and detail of managers and operators reporting requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan for livestock needs

elements.title: Seek information on innovations for existing or potential workplaces and farm activities

pcs.text: Identify and access sources of information on innovations relevant to the workplace and livestock species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and access sources of information on innovations relevant to the workplace and livestock species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and access sources of information on innovations relevant to the workplace and livestock species.

pcs.text: Assess information on innovations to determine whether they could be used in current or a future workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess information on innovations to determine whether they could be used in current or a future workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess information on innovations to determine whether they could be used in current or a future workplace.

pcs.text: Amend production plans to include innovations deemed suitable for use in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Amend production plans to include innovations deemed suitable for use in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Amend production plans to include innovations deemed suitable for use in the workplace.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Seek information on innovations for existing or potential workplaces and farm activities

elements.title: Test and adopt relevant innovations

pcs.text: Consult people who may be involved in implementing the innovation or in planning for it and discuss the change with them
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult people who may be involved in implementing the innovation or in planning for it and discuss the change with them?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult people who may be involved in implementing the innovation or in planning for it and discuss the change with them.

pcs.text: Test innovations on the farm to determine whether they are suitable, and whether they may be readily adapted to suit the circumstances of the business
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test innovations on the farm to determine whether they are suitable, and whether they may be readily adapted to suit the circumstances of the business?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test innovations on the farm to determine whether they are suitable, and whether they may be readily adapted to suit the circumstances of the business.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, animal welfare, biosecurity or environmental risks associated with trial phase, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures, animal welfare practices, or biosecurity and environment legislation, regulations and workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, animal welfare, biosecurity or environmental risks associated with trial phase, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures, animal welfare practices, or biosecurity and environment legislation, regulations and workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, animal welfare, biosecurity or environmental risks associated with trial phase, and implement control measures according to workplace health and safety procedures, animal welfare practices, or biosecurity and environment legislation, regulations and workplace practices.

pcs.text: Decide whether or not to adopt the innovation, based on its costs and benefits and any implementation issues, including workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental considerations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decide whether or not to adopt the innovation, based on its costs and benefits and any implementation issues, including workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental considerations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decide whether or not to adopt the innovation, based on its costs and benefits and any implementation issues, including workplace health and safety, animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental considerations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Test and adopt relevant innovations

elements.title: Implement, monitor and evaluate livestock production plans

pcs.text: Implement and monitor production plans according to the calendar of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement and monitor production plans according to the calendar of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and monitor production plans according to the calendar of operations.

pcs.text: Site, erect or install production facilities that deal sensitively with identified waste products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Site, erect or install production facilities that deal sensitively with identified waste products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Site, erect or install production facilities that deal sensitively with identified waste products.

pcs.text: Evaluate livestock growth and maturity or production according to the planned targets and the marketing requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate livestock growth and maturity or production according to the planned targets and the marketing requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate livestock growth and maturity or production according to the planned targets and the marketing requirements.

pcs.text: Monitor livestock health, and control and prevent parasite and disease outbreaks quickly and effectively
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor livestock health, and control and prevent parasite and disease outbreaks quickly and effectively?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor livestock health, and control and prevent parasite and disease outbreaks quickly and effectively.

pcs.text: Assess feed supplies, monitor pasture or landscape condition and species composition, and vary stocking rates to maintain optimum pasture and livestock health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess feed supplies, monitor pasture or landscape condition and species composition, and vary stocking rates to maintain optimum pasture and livestock health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess feed supplies, monitor pasture or landscape condition and species composition, and vary stocking rates to maintain optimum pasture and livestock health.

pcs.text: Identify, monitor and manage workplace health and safety hazards, animal welfare, biosecurity or environmental impacts relating to livestock production in the business to promote optimum pasture, livestock and employee health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, monitor and manage workplace health and safety hazards, animal welfare, biosecurity or environmental impacts relating to livestock production in the business to promote optimum pasture, livestock and employee health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, monitor and manage workplace health and safety hazards, animal welfare, biosecurity or environmental impacts relating to livestock production in the business to promote optimum pasture, livestock and employee health.

pcs.text: Analyse physical and financial records and extractions taken from them to assess production performance, and to provide information for business and taxation purposes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse physical and financial records and extractions taken from them to assess production performance, and to provide information for business and taxation purposes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse physical and financial records and extractions taken from them to assess production performance, and to provide information for business and taxation purposes.

pcs.text: Evaluate the production performance of each workplace to determine whether they are sustainable and profitable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the production performance of each workplace to determine whether they are sustainable and profitable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the production performance of each workplace to determine whether they are sustainable and profitable.

pcs.text: Document evaluation findings for use in reviewing and revising production plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document evaluation findings for use in reviewing and revising production plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document evaluation findings for use in reviewing and revising production plans.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Implement, monitor and evaluate livestock production plans

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain information about the legal requirements and regulations that affect farmland ownership and possession and livestock production.

pcs.text: Determine record keeping requirements, and establish procedures to ensure regulatory and taxation legislation compliance

pcs.text: Obtain permits from relevant authorities for the transport and movement of livestock and equipment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permits from relevant authorities for the transport and movement of livestock and equipment.
